Feature_Description: This procedure is used for the case when the UE moves from one gNB-DU to another gNB-DU within the same gNB-CU during NR operation for LTM.
Feature_Objectives: To enable UE mobility for LTM between gNB-DUs under the same gNB-CU.
To configure LTM in the candidate gNB-DU.
To establish UE context in the candidate gNB-DU.
Procedure_Implementation_Steps: 3. The gNB-CU sends a UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message to the candidate gNB-DU(s) for each candidate cell, containing one candidate cell ID and the CSI resource configuration for subsequent LTM. The gNB-CU may provide the LTM configuration ID mapping list to the candidate gNB-DU(s). The gNB-CU may request PRACH resources from the candidate gNB-DU(s). The gNB-CU may request the candidate gNB-DU(s) to provide the lower layer configuration for the purpose of generating the reference configuration or provide the lower layer part of the reference configuration to the candidate gNB-DU(s).

4. If the candidate gNB-DU accepts the request of LTM configuration, it responds with a UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message including the generated lower layer RRC configurations for the accepted target candidate cell.

Code_Instructions.description: Defines the structure for the F1AP UE Context Setup Request message, specifying all Information Elements (IEs) to be included when the gNB-CU initiates the setup towards the gNB-DU.
Defines the structure for the F1AP UE Context Setup Response message, specifying the IEs expected from the gNB-DU in response to a UE Context Setup Request.
A helper function used by the gNB-CU to generate and populate the F1AP UE Context Setup Request message structure with RRC-specific information before sending it to the gNB-DU.
A function likely responsible for preparing or encoding the F1AP UE Context Setup Request message at a lower layer (e.g., MAC/RRC interface) before transmission over the F1 interface.
A utility function for copying byte arrays, useful for populating variable-length Information Elements (IEs) within F1AP messages.
A memory allocation utility that allocates memory and handles potential failures, crucial for dynamically creating F1AP message structures and their components.
A memory allocation utility that allocates and initializes memory to zero, useful for creating F1AP message structures to ensure default values.
A function to activate a Signalling Radio Bearer (SRB), which is a critical part of UE context configuration during setup or handover.
A function responsible for populating Data Radio Bearer (DRB) information, which is essential for configuring the UE's data plane during UE Context Setup.
A utility function for the gNB-CU to retrieve existing UE-specific data associated with the F1 interface, necessary when preparing F1AP messages like UE Context Setup Request.
A utility function to obtain the next available transaction identifier for F1AP messages, ensuring proper correlation between requests and responses.
